title: boerhavia erecta var. intermedia
intro: Boerhavia erecta var. intermedia, also known as Red Sage or Red Spurred Orache, is a type of succulent plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever and treat skin conditions such as wounds and boils. The health benefits of Boerhavia erecta var. intermedia include its ability to lower blood pressure, act as a diuretic, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Boerhavia erecta var. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
